name: Kinko Optical Co., Ltd.
summary: Kinko Optical Co., Ltd. designs, develops, produces, and sells optical components and lens worldwide. The company offers digital single-lens reflex camera, 3D sensing, mobile phone, projector, NB, surveillance, IP camera, security camera, automotive, panoramic camera, Internet of Things, industrial camera, telescope, and sports camera lenses. It also provides spherical and aspherical glass lens OEM, and lens ODM services. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
